name: Almond Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour the bottom of a loaf pan.
3. In a large bowl, mix the Bisquick baking mix, all-purpose flour, and sugar. Cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse cornmeal.
4. Stir the almonds and cinnamon into half of the butter mixture in a separate small bowl; set aside.
5. In another bowl, beat the eggs with milk, vanilla extract, and almond extract and stir into the remaining butter mixture. The batter will be lumpy.
6. Pour about half of the batter into the pan and sprinkle with half of the almond mixture. Pour the remaining batter into the pan and sprinkle with the remaining almond mixture.
7. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Allow cooling for 5 minutes.
9. Loosen the sides of the loaf pan; carefully remove the bread and allow it to cool completely before slicing.
